hero.subheading: A conversion system engineered to scale paid acquisition into predictable revenue.

background.title: Scaling Novelty Ecommerce
description: Scotland Titles had strong demand but inefficient scaling. Ideom rebuilt the acquisition and conversion engine—transforming paid traffic into a high-efficiency revenue system that compounded over three consecutive quarters.
By focusing on gifting psychology and emotional triggers, we unlocked a predictable revenue stream that scaled alongside increased ad spend without diminishing returns.
background.quote: Ideom transformed our paid acquisition into a predictable growth engine. We scaled faster with more efficiency.

challenges.title: The Scaling Ceiling
description: Inefficient paid acquisition with declining returns on major social platforms.
Low conversion rates on existing landing pages that failed to capture the emotional hook of the product.
Difficulty scaling ad spend without a proportional drop in profitability.
Weak differentiation in ad messaging compared to emerging competitors in the novelty space.

solutions.title: High-Efficiency Funnels
description: Developed high-performing ad creatives focused on gifting psychology and emotional ownership triggers.
Redesigned the landing page experience to emphasize perceived value and simplified lead capture.
Refined bundles and pricing presentation to increase Average Order Value (AOV) by 28%.
Implemented a structured media buying framework to scale spend while keeping ROAS above targets.

emailSequence.title: Campaign Deep Dive
description: 1. Gift Angle Campaign: Leveraged novelty and emotional triggers to increase impulse purchases.
2. Personal Ownership: Created perceived status and ownership identity to drive higher AOVs.
3. Seasonal Push: Used urgency and fast delivery reassurance to spike conversions during peak periods.
4. The Result: A 41% lift in conversion rate through continuous landing page and offer testing.

thoughtProcess.title: The strategic playbook
content: In the novelty gifting space, you aren't selling a product—you're selling a feeling.
We identified that the 'Gift Angle' was the highest leverage point for scaling. By positioning the product as 'the most unique gift they’ll ever receive,' we bypassed traditional price comparisons.
We then built the 'Push-Pull' system: Push demand through Meta's emotional hooks, and Pull it through with a frictionless, high-trust landing page experience.
The results speak for themselves: $887K in growth within 9 months, driven by logic, math, and empathy.

emails.label: Meta: Gift Angle
explanation: Focused on the 'Most Unique Gift' hook to drive immediate impulse clicks.
Used high-production unboxing video to build desire and showcase product quality.
Targeted cold audiences with specific 'Gifter' profiles to ensure relevance.
Resulted in the highest CTR and lowest CPA of any creative in the set.

emails.label: Meta / Google: Ownership
explanation: Positioned the titles as a status symbol and identity-driven purchase.
Captured high-intent search through the 'Own a piece of Scotland' angle.
Used trust signals and authority framing to justify the premium price point.
Strong ROAS and significant contribution to the 28% increase in AOV.

emails.label: Landing Page: The Closer
explanation: Developed a trust-heavy mobile-first experience that loaded in under 1.5s.
Simplified the checkout flow to reduce friction and abandoned carts.
Integrated real-time unboxing proof and social trust badges to build confidence.
Lifted overall store conversion rate by 41% within the first two months.

results.label: ROAS
results.desc: Improvement in return on ad spend.

results.label: AOV
results.desc: Increase in average order value via optimized bundling.

testimonials.quote: Ideom transformed our paid acquisition into a predictable growth engine. We scaled faster with more efficiency.
